message:
feat(fsfs): add 7 runtime modules for agent ergonomics, query pipeline, and filesystem watching

agent_ergonomics (800 lines): Ultra-agent token-efficient CLI layer with
three facilities: compact payload profile (~30-50% token reduction via
abbreviated field names and null/empty stripping), stable result IDs
(deterministic short identifiers for follow-up commands like "explain R3"),
and query templates (parameterized patterns for common agent workflows).

pressure_sensing (803 lines): Host pressure sensing with sysinfo-backed
OS signal collection. 4-state control model (Normal/Constrained/Degraded/
Emergency) with EWMA smoothing (configurable alpha), hysteresis via
separate enter/exit thresholds, and anti-flap guard requiring N
consecutive readings before state transitions.

profiling (396 lines): Profiling harness contracts for optimization
cycles. Defines deterministic profiling workflow (flamegraph/heap/syscall),
impact-confidence-effort opportunity matrix, and single-lever iteration
validator for behavior-preserving optimizations.

query_execution (1022 lines): Multi-stage query execution orchestration
across lexical/semantic/fusion/rerank phases. Specifies cancellation
semantics with partial-result correctness, deterministic rank fusion with
explicit tie-break policy, and degraded-mode compatibility driven by
pressure state.

query_planning (1130 lines): Query intent classification and retrieval-
budget mapping. Defines explicit intent categories, deterministic
confidence model, profile-aware budget mapping (latency/fanout/rerank),
and robust fallback behavior for uncertain or malformed input.

stream_protocol (954 lines): Streaming query protocol for --stream agent
CLI mode. Machine-stable NDJSON and TOON streaming frames with protocol
versioning, record separator framing, and frame type taxonomy.

watcher (1179 lines): Filesystem watcher for live incremental re-indexing.
Coalesces rapid events via debounce windows, classifies changed files
through discovery policy, adapts behavior based on pressure state, and
provides deterministic snapshot diffing for crash-recovery catch-up.

lib.rs: Register new modules and re-export agent_ergonomics public API.
runtime.rs: Integrate FsWatcher into watch mode lifecycle with pressure
sensing feedback loop (sample_interval_ms polling, apply_pressure_state).
Update await_shutdown to accept optional watcher reference and drive
pressure controller updates during the event loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
